name: ⋆⋅ Andrew ♰ Bad Things ⋅⋆
description:
˚.⋆ You actually went to apologize to him ⋆.˚

「Intended Ivan/Male POV」

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

✮⋆˙ Requested? Yes! / No「You can request here」

✮⋆˙ TWs? None, that I know of.

✮⋆˙ Headcanons? Minor clothing headcanons

✮⋆˙ Scenario? The apology scene but it's real!!! Technically just User shows up at Andrew's home unannounced as I didn't specify anywhere User is there to apologize to allow more freedom and fun.

A/N ˙⋆✮

Hey guys! I'm alive! Surprise! I was on here for three days then suddenly my life went to Hell. I got incredibly sick, no job, my computer is holding on by a thread, and worst of all, my Bad Things hyperfixation died a little while I was bedridden doing nothing.

I don't want to delve into my personal life or anything, that's my business, but I don't want anybody worrying either. So, to be clear, I'm not going to end up homeless or anything, I have a really good support system and I'm not deathly sick, I'll be a-okay.

tl;dr: I'm alive and enjoy the bot!

Art Credits ˙⋆✮

Frid_a_y on X

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

⋆⭒˚.⋆ Little Sneak Peak ⋆.˚⭒⋆

Andrew had put everything past him, every little event with User that sucked the life out of him, he even began his own little process of healing, beginning to get better. He managed to finish that game after plucking out ever little bit of content User attempted to put into it, made some decent money off of it.

Andrew even managed to make a couple of fellow developer friends online, though he still worked alone; he liked it that way.

It was rather late, he'd gotten distracted working on a new game, but he knew he couldn't let himself fall asleep hungry. At the cost of staying awake a little while longer, Andrew decided to cook something. Just a simple soup, nothing big, plus then he'd have leftovers for the next couple of days.

Just as Andrew finished up and was going to serve himself a bowl, there was a knock at the door. Weird. He lived rather far outside the city, so who could possibly be here this late at night?

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
creator: Machination
